title: Fusion Food Double Walled Coffee Glasses Mugs - Pack of 2x250ML Cappuccino Latte Macchiato Glasses Cups for Coffee, Tea, Milk, Juice & Ice Cream |Borosilicate Heat Resistant Glass Cups| Xmas Gifts
features: 𝗗𝗼𝘂𝗯𝗹𝗲 𝗪𝗮𝗹𝗹 𝗜𝗻𝘀𝘂𝗹𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻: These premium double walled glass coffee mugs keep your beverages hot while keeping your hands cool. Perfect for coffee, tea, cappuccino, or even iced drinks, offering thermal efficiency and elegant style for every sip.

𝗛𝗶𝗴𝗵-𝗤𝘂𝗮𝗹𝗶𝘁𝘆 𝗕𝗼𝗿𝗼𝘀𝗶𝗹𝗶𝗰𝗮𝘁𝗲 𝗚𝗹𝗮𝘀𝘀: Made from durable, heat-resistant borosilicate glass that’s stronger and clearer than standard glass. It resists scratching, retains clarity, and can handle both hot and cold temperatures with ease.

𝗘𝗹𝗲𝗴𝗮𝗻𝘁 𝗗𝗲𝘀𝗶𝗴𝗻 𝘄𝗶𝘁𝗵 𝗛𝗮𝗻𝗱𝗹𝗲: Each 250ml glass mug features a comfortable handle and minimalist design that complements any kitchen or coffee setup. The transparent glass enhances your drink presentation, ideal for home or café use.

𝗘𝗮𝘀𝘆 𝘁𝗼 𝗖𝗹𝗲𝗮𝗻 & 𝗠𝗮𝗶𝗻𝘁𝗮𝗶𝗻: Designed for convenience, these mugs are hand-wash only and feature a smooth, non-porous surface that prevents stains and odors. Simply rinse and wipe clean for long-lasting shine and clarity.

𝗩𝗲𝗿𝘀𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗹𝗲 & 𝗣𝗿𝗮𝗰𝘁𝗶𝗰𝗮𝗹 𝗦𝗲𝘁: Comes as a set of 2 double wall mugs (250ml each), perfect for everyday use, entertaining guests, or gifting. Ideal for hot coffee, lattes, or even soups and cold beverages.
